intended_use: Spine Auto Views is a non-invasive image analysis software package which may be used in conjunction with CT images to aid in the automatic generation of anatomically focused multi-planar reformats and
intended_use_full: Spine Auto Views is a non-invasive image analysis software package which may be used in conjunction with CT images to aid in the automatic generation of anatomically focused multi-planar reformats and automatically export results to pre-determined DICOM destinations.
ground_truth: Retrospective CT exam database representative of intended clinical scenarios with consideration of acquisition parameters and patient characteristics; manual assessment by radiologist readers.
other_metrics: Oblique axial reformats generated user acceptable results greater than 95% of the time for all readers
